productDisplayName: Proline Men Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Navy blue track pants made of 100% polyester, has an elasticated waistband with drawcord, full mesh lining, side pockets, elasticated cord and toggle on hems and printed branding on left leg Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash inside out, separately, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Look stylish as you work out in the gym, go for a walk or jog in the park. These navy blue track pants from proline belong in your wardrobe as they'll add a sporty spark to your look. The side pockets are spacious enough for everything from your wallet to iPod, the fabric is lightweight, the waist band is soft and for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt, an excellent pair of running shoes, and you'll be ready to hit the road. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32&rdquo
